caption:
never getting over this magical pink lake ✨🌅💟💕💗✨ #pinklake #shiraz #iran @visitouriran 

📍 Maharloo is a seasonal salt lake about an hour away from Shiraz, also famous for its pink mosque, with a dominant pink hue because of the amount of red tide in it; however, the strength of the color differs in various times of the year

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2
